_comment: Phase 11 close 2026-05-02. Sprint 11.2 SWC swap retried + LANDED: every TypeORM cross-entity property wrapped in Relation<> type alias (12 entity files), breaking the legacy-decorator circular emit chain that blocked Phase 10's first attempt. Full BE suite 519s → 119s (~4×); --testTimeout 30s → 15s. Coverage thresholds re-pinned to SWC actuals (89/75/87/89): SWC's decoratorMetadata: true emits more instrumentable nodes than ts-jest (~1pt line/branch shift), but functions coverage RISES from 85.80 → 87.19. Earlier Phase 10 close: Sprint 10.1 fixed Bug 2 (MessageFeedback messageId column lookup); Sprint 10.2 fixed Bug 1 (TIMESTAMPTZ migration); Sprint 10.3 added Redis testcontainer + bullmq scheduler integration. All 6 it.skip Phase 9 markers in chat-repository-typeorm.integration.test.ts now green (41/41 with RUN_INTEGRATION=true).
_comment_mutation: Baseline 2026-05-16 audit-360 T3.3 (computed killed/(killed+survived+timeout+runtimeError) = 2169/7062 = 30.71%, sourced from museum-backend/reports/stryker-incremental.json — the on-disk report at introduction; full json reporter writes reports/mutation/mutation.json and the hook prefers that path when present). Pre-launch floor 35 = audit-360 spec target with modest headroom over baseline (30.71%); intentionally RED today so T3.1/T3.2 open-handle mitigations are forced through before merge. Target post-mitigation Phase 4 once the 4594 Timeout bucket collapses into Killed: 40%. Enterprise: 80%. NoCoverage (923) excluded from denominator — those mutants are uncoverable by current tests; the mitigation is to add tests, not lower the cap. No SKIP_MUTATION_RATCHET env-var — UFR-020.
